overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Marvel's Spider-Man: Miles Morales showing the character web-swinging through a snowy Manhattan. The clip features high-altitude aerial traversal between skyscrapers, street-level running through snow-covered roads, and interaction with an elevated train, all during a winter snowstorm with overcast lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: high altitude traversal between Manhattan skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: web-swinging acrobatically between tall buildings at high altitude, performing flips and dives

entered.detail: tall brown brick apartment building with multiple windows and snow on ledges
street below covered in snow with visible traffic
snow-dusted trees lining the street below

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with high-altitude web-swinging between towering skyscrapers in a snowy Manhattan. The camera follows Spider-Man as he arcs between a tall brick residential tower on the left and a modern office building on the right, with snow-covered streets and bare trees visible far below.

scene_state.functional_zone: mixed altitude aerial traversal approaching historic district

events.description: character performs a rapid dive maneuver descending toward street level before swinging back up

agents.ego_description: swinging through varying altitudes with acrobatic flips, transitioning between different architectural zones

entered.detail: ornate historic building with pointed spires and detailed stonework
metal elevated train tracks running between buildings
lower commercial buildings with storefronts at street level

segments.scene_description: Continuing the aerial traversal, the character swings toward a historic gothic building with distinctive spires. The altitude varies as Spider-Man dives and climbs, passing elevated train tracks and transitioning from high-rise towers to lower commercial buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered commercial street with market entrance

events.description: descends from aerial swinging to street level running
passes through decorated brick archway into market area

agents.ego_description: running down the center of snow-covered streets between parked cars, navigating through pedestrian areas

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking on sidewalk with winter coats and umbrellas
snow-covered sedan parked along the curb

entered.detail: red brick archway decorated with garlands marking market entrance
colorful market stalls with blue and green canopies
ground-level shops with large windows and signage
metal scaffolding structure on building facade

segments.scene_description: The character descends to street level and transitions to running through snow-covered commercial streets. Passing through a decorated brick archway into a market area, the scene shows moderate pedestrian activity, parked cars, and construction scaffolding while Spider-Man navigates at ground level.

scene_state.functional_zone: ascending from street level back to rooftop height

events.description: launches back into web-swinging from street level
passes large colorful mural painted on building facade

agents.ego_description: web-swinging at low altitude between buildings before ascending back to higher elevations

entered.detail: colorful painted mural featuring abstract designs on brick wall
illuminated store sign with green lettering
elevated train tracks reappearing in the distance

segments.scene_description: Launching back into the air from street level, the character swings past a large colorful mural and a liquor store sign while ascending. The camera follows the upward trajectory as elevated train tracks come back into view in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated train track corridor with industrial buildings

events.description: lands on top of moving elevated train
launches off train roof back into swinging

agents.ego_description: landing on and briefly riding the elevated train before launching off to continue swinging

notable_agents.action: silver elevated train moving along snow-covered tracks

entered.detail: long silver commuter train moving on elevated tracks
covered train station platform with waiting area
older industrial brick warehouses with large windows

segments.scene_description: The final segment features Spider-Man approaching and landing on a moving elevated train, briefly riding it before launching off. The scene is dominated by the elevated train tracks, industrial brick buildings, and a train station platform, with the character interacting directly with the moving train vehicle.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that descends from a high-altitude aerial traversal of a snowy cityscape down to the bustling activity of a street-level market. It begins with Spider-Man arcing between towering brick residential and modern office buildings, with snow-covered streets and bare trees visible far below. As the traversal continues, the camera follows a series of dives and climbs past elevated train tracks and the spires of a historic gothic building, shifting the perspective from high-rise towers toward lower commercial structures. The scene then transitions as the character descends rapidly to ground level, moving from the open air into the confined space of a decorated brick archway. Finally, the movement settles into a run through snow-covered commercial streets filled with parked cars, construction scaffolding, and pedestrians.

The shot follows a continuous upward trajectory from the city streets toward the industrial heights of an elevated railway. It begins at street level, ascending rapidly past a colorful mural and a liquor store sign as the camera tracks the character's climb. As the height increases, the view expands to reveal the distant lines of the elevated train tracks set against a backdrop of brick buildings. The scene then shifts focus toward the railway infrastructure, culminating as the character closes the gap to land on a moving train. Finally, the camera captures a brief moment of riding atop the vehicle before the character launches off again near a station platform.
